No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its specific targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to ending hunger, malnutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course is for graduate students (tertiary education, Target 4.3), equipping them with advanced statistical methods and data analysis skills for professional careers (Target 4.4) and enhancing knowledge (Target 4.7).
evidence: 本課程旨在拓展研究生對統計學各領域前沿議題的理解與視野
具備進階統計方法理論推導之能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to gender equality, discrimination, or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course equips students with advanced statistical methods and data analysis, contributing to technological upgrading (Target 8.2) and providing career planning inspiration for future decent work.
evidence: 激發研究問題意識與生涯規劃靈感
familiar with the application and practices of advanced statistical methods

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances scientific research capabilities by exposing students to cutting-edge issues and inspiring research questions, directly supporting innovation and technological upgrading (Target 9.5).
evidence: 拓展研究生對統計學各領域前沿議題的理解與視野
激發研究問題意識與生涯規劃靈感
運用研究方法增進知識

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to reducing income inequality or promoting inclusion for vulnerable groups.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to urban development, housing, transport, or cultural heritage.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or waste reduction.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to climate change, mitigation, or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly aims to equip students with professional ethics and strengthen research ethics, contributing to the development of accountable and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 強化研究倫理與專業素養

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fosters knowledge sharing and partnerships by inviting domestic and foreign scholars for lectures and promoting student interaction and academic exchange (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
evidence: 邀請國內外學者蒞校進行學術演講
